testsuite.name: ReserveInventoryWorker

testcase.name: should handle failure with retry when exception occurs
successful execution should complete task with reservation reference

testsuite.system-out: 13:49:15.624 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.BaseExternalTaskWorker -- [Worker=reserve-inventory] START orderId=null taskId=null 13:49:15.624 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.ReserveInventoryWorker -- [ReserveInventory] Reserving inventory for orderId=null customerId=CUST-001 amount=2000.0 13:49:15.625 [Test worker] ERROR com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.BaseExternalTaskWorker -- [Worker=reserve-inventory] FAILED orderId=null retries_remaining=2 backoff_ms=1000: Cannot invoke "String.substring(int,
